metadata.description: Professional Rust development plugin: specialist agents with LSP integration, team orchestration, and peer-to-peer communication

plugins.name: rust-agents
plugins.description: Comprehensive collection of specialized Rust development agents with Claude Code best practices. Includes rust-teamlead agent and rust-team skill for multi-agent collaborative development. rust-analyzer LSP integration. Handoff protocol for context sharing. Adversarial critic for stress-testing designs. Updated for Rust Edition 2024 and modern tooling.
